{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Manager",
  "description": "Logisoft Solutions is a&nbsp;Remote HR Management Service dedicated to building inclusive and engaging work cultures. We believe that great teams are built on collaboration, respect, and empowerment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ijegun, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a competent and experienced Manager to oversee daily operations, supervise staff, and ensure the smooth running of the organization.
	The ideal candidate should be a strong leader who can manage teams effectively, maintain operational standards, and contribute to business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day operations of the organisation.
	Supervise and coordinate staff activities to ensure efficiency and productivity.
	Monitor workflow, address operational challenges, and implement solutions.
	Ensure excellent customer service and handle escalated customer concerns.
	Manage inventory, supplies, and operational resources where necessary.
	Prepare operational reports and provide updates to management.
	Enforce company policies, procedures, and standards.
	Train, support, and motivate team members.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or relevant qualification in Management, Business Administration, or a related field (preferred).
	Proven experience in a managerial or supervisory role.
	Strong leadership and decision-making skills.
	Excellent communication and organisational abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple responsibilities.
	Good problem-solving and team management skills.


Salary
N80,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cv.brainyhr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	For more enquiries, contact via WhatsApp: 09031641216.
	Preference will be given to applicants residing in Ijegun and their surrounding areas.
	Ensure you live around Ijegun.
	Must be available to work on weekends.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-13",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-04",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Logisoft Solutions"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "195899"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 75000,
      "maxValue": 150000,

Manager Job at Logisoft Solutions




        
    

        
        Logisoft Solutions is a Remote HR Management Service dedicated to building inclusive and engaging work cultures. We believe that great teams are built on collaboration, respect, and empowerment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Manager

Job Location: Ijegun, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a competent and experienced Manager to oversee daily operations, supervise staff, and ensure the smooth running of the organization.
	The ideal candidate should be a strong leader who can manage teams effectively, maintain operational standards, and contribute to business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day operations of the organisation.
	Supervise and coordinate staff activities to ensure efficiency and productivity.
	Monitor workflow, address operational challenges, and implement solutions.
	Ensure excellent customer service and handle escalated customer concerns.
	Manage inventory, supplies, and operational resources where necessary.
	Prepare operational reports and provide updates to management.
	Enforce company policies, procedures, and standards.
	Train, support, and motivate team members.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or relevant qualification in Management, Business Administration, or a related field (preferred).
	Proven experience in a managerial or supervisory role.
	Strong leadership and decision-making skills.
	Excellent communication and organisational abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple responsibilities.
	Good problem-solving and team management skills.


Salary
N80,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	For more enquiries, contact via WhatsApp: 09031641216.
	Preference will be given to applicants residing in Ijegun and their surrounding areas.
	Ensure you live around Ijegun.
	Must be available to work on weekends.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Customer Care Representative",
  "description": "At Forth Urban Limited, we believe owning property should be transparent, accessible, and empowering. We guide clients through the real estate process with expert insights, verified properties, and unwavering integrity. From urban plots to estate developments, every transaction is backed by professional due diligence, personalized support, and a deep understanding of local value growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Customer Care Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)

Responsibilities


	Deliver exceptional customer experience, handle inquiries, and build strong client relationships.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.
	Smart and proactive individuals.
	Strong communication and teamwork skills.
	Results-driven mindset.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;info@forthurban.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Are you passionate, creative, and ready to grow in a dynamic organization? This is your opportunity to be part of a forward-thinking team.
	Join us and be part of a team shaping the future of real estate and business innovation.
	For more enquiries, contact: +234 911 165 8936.

Customer Care Representative Job at Forth Urban Limited




        
    

        
        At Forth Urban Limited, we believe owning property should be transparent, accessible, and empowering. We guide clients through the real estate process with expert insights, verified properties, and unwavering integrity. From urban plots to estate developments, every transaction is backed by professional due diligence, personalized support, and a deep understanding of local value growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Care Representative

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Deliver exceptional customer experience, handle inquiries, and build strong client relationships.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.
	Smart and proactive individuals.
	Strong communication and teamwork skills.
	Results-driven mindset.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Are you passionate, creative, and ready to grow in a dynamic organization? This is your opportunity to be part of a forward-thinking team.
	Join us and be part of a team shaping the future of real estate and business innovation.
	For more enquiries, contact: +234 911 165 8936.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Control Inspector - Subsea Projects & Services",
  "description": "Baker Hughes, a GE company (NYSE:BHGE), is the world&#39;s first and only fullstream provider of integrated oilfield products, services and digital solutions. Drawing on a storied heritage of invention, BHGE harnesses the passion and experience of its people to enhance productivity across the oil and gas value chain.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Quality Control Inspector - Subsea Projects &amp; Services

Job No:&nbsp;R161648
Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria

Fuel your passion


	The Quality Control Inspector performs quality inspection activities related to the manufacture, service, repair and refurbishment of Subsea Equipment, to verify and assure compliance with Baker Hughes specifications and requirements.
	Reporting to the Site Quality Lead, the QC Inspector is responsible for receipt inspection, in-process inspection and final release inspection activities and for creating and maintaining records of such activities in accordance with documented requirements.
	The QC Inspector performs witness and verification of equipment undergoing acceptance testing and reviews the results of such tests for compliance with requirements.
	The QC Inspector records and reports non-conforming product identified in the course of inspection activities and quarantines such items for authorized disposition.


Responsibilities
As a Quality Control Inspector, you will be responsible for:


	Maintaining product standards through the application of rigorous inspection techniques.
	Inspecting new manufacture supplier provided parts, supplier repaired / refurbished parts and intra-company supplied parts, including supporting documentation to verify compliance with specified technical requirements referenced within relevant drawings, specifications and standards.
	Inspecting components, sub-assemblies, assemblies and associated documentation to confirm compliance with Baker Hughes specifications and standards.
	Performing inspection activities at supplier premises, or other off-site locations, when required
	Creating and maintaining accurate records of inspection activities.
	Using, controlling and caring for inspection metrology equipment and ensuring the valid calibration status of such items.
	Systematic follow-up of Assembly and Refurbishment activities utilizing ITPs and other documentation for proper control.
	Identifying, controlling and reporting, via the Non Conformance Management (NCM), non-conforming product.
	Identifying and driving continuous improvement opportunities
	Participating in root cause analysis, non-conformance analysis, customer issue resolution analysis and other continuous improvement activities aimed at reducing cost of quality, improving on time delivery and customer satisfaction.
	Adherence to and compliance with company and regulatory Quality management system requirements at all times.
	Adherence to and compliance with company and regulatory HSE requirements &amp; expectations always
	Carry out any other assigned jobs as required.


To be successful in this role you will


	Have at least Bachelor&#39;s Degree from an accredited university or college
	Have 3 years of minimum experience in a similar quality role and experience in the Oil and Gas industry
	Have detailed knowledge of inspection and metrology techniques and processes
	Have an engineering background, such as time-served mechanical or electrical technician&nbsp;
	Have a thorough understanding of manufacturing drawings, geometric and dimensional tolerances and specifications.
	Knowledge of and familiarity with relevant company and industry standards
	Detailed knowledge of requirements associated with the control of monitoring and measuring devices.
	Able to generate concise and detailed reports of inspection findings
	Familiar with the use of Microsoft Office applications
	Experienced and familiar with the requirements of formal Quality Management Systems and standards, such as ISO 9001:2015, API Q1 and API Q2
	Familiar with industry standards such as API, ISO etc.
	Good communication skills
	Flexible attitude to working patterns
	Willingness and ability to travel.

Quality Control Inspector - Subsea Projects & Services Job at Baker Hughes




        
    

        
        Baker Hughes, a GE company (NYSE:BHGE), is the world's first and only fullstream provider of integrated oilfield products, services and digital solutions. Drawing on a storied heritage of invention, BHGE harnesses the passion and experience of its people to enhance productivity across the oil and gas value chain.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Inspector - Subsea Projects & Services

Job No: R161648
Job Location: Nigeria

Fuel your passion
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Quality Control Inspector performs quality inspection activities related to the manufacture, service, repair and refurbishment of Subsea Equipment, to verify and assure compliance with Baker Hughes specifications and requirements.
	Reporting to the Site Quality Lead, the QC Inspector is responsible for receipt inspection, in-process inspection and final release inspection activities and for creating and maintaining records of such activities in accordance with documented requirements.
	The QC Inspector performs witness and verification of equipment undergoing acceptance testing and reviews the results of such tests for compliance with requirements.
	The QC Inspector records and reports non-conforming product identified in the course of inspection activities and quarantines such items for authorized disposition.


Responsibilities
As a Quality Control Inspector, you will be responsible for:


	Maintaining product standards through the application of rigorous inspection techniques.
	Inspecting new manufacture supplier provided parts, supplier repaired / refurbished parts and intra-company supplied parts, including supporting documentation to verify compliance with specified technical requirements referenced within relevant drawings, specifications and standards.
	Inspecting components, sub-assemblies, assemblies and associated documentation to confirm compliance with Baker Hughes specifications and standards.
	Performing inspection activities at supplier premises, or other off-site locations, when required
	Creating and maintaining accurate records of inspection activities.
	Using, controlling and caring for inspection metrology equipment and ensuring the valid calibration status of such items.
	Systematic follow-up of Assembly and Refurbishment activities utilizing ITPs and other documentation for proper control.
	Identifying, controlling and reporting, via the Non Conformance Management (NCM), non-conforming product.
	Identifying and driving continuous improvement opportunities
	Participating in root cause analysis, non-conformance analysis, customer issue resolution analysis and other continuous improvement activities aimed at reducing cost of quality, improving on time delivery and customer satisfaction.
	Adherence to and compliance with company and regulatory Quality management system requirements at all times.
	Adherence to and compliance with company and regulatory HSE requirements & expectations always
	Carry out any other assigned jobs as required.


To be successful in this role you will


	Have at least Bachelor's Degree from an accredited university or college
	Have 3 years of minimum experience in a similar quality role and experience in the Oil and Gas industry
	Have detailed knowledge of inspection and metrology techniques and processes
	Have an engineering background, such as time-served mechanical or electrical technician 
	Have a thorough understanding of manufacturing drawings, geometric and dimensional tolerances and specifications.
	Knowledge of and familiarity with relevant company and industry standards
	Detailed knowledge of requirements associated with the control of monitoring and measuring devices.
	Able to generate concise and detailed reports of inspection findings
	Familiar with the use of Microsoft Office applications
	Experienced and familiar with the requirements of formal Quality Management Systems and standards, such as ISO 9001:2015, API Q1 and API Q2
	Familiar with industry standards such as API, ISO etc.
	Good communication skills
	Flexible attitude to working patterns
	Willingness and ability to travel.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager",
  "description": "DreamCity Capital is a pioneering and rapidly growing platform at the intersection of real estate and digital investment. We specialize in democratizing access to premium real estate assets through innovative structures like Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs) and technology-driven investment products. Our mission is to deliver superior returns and financial inclusion while upholding the highest standards of integrity and compliance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;&amp; On-Site

Position Overview


	We are seeking an accomplished General Manager for DreamCity Capital with a minimum of 7 years of specialized experience in REIT management, capital markets, and investment platform operations.
	The ideal candidate will be a strategic leader with deep financial expertise, strong regulatory knowledge, and a proven ability to drive sales, build high-performing teams, and ensure platform excellence.
	This role is pivotal in positioning DreamCity Capital as a market leader in Nigeria&#39;s evolving investment landscape.


Key Responsibilities


	Project Creation &amp; Offerings: Oversee the end-to-end creation, structuring, and launching of investment projects and offers on the DCC platform, ensuring they meet market demands and investor expectations.
	Regulatory Compliance &amp; SEC Liaison: Serve as the primary liaison with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and other regulatory bodies, ensuring full compliance with all investment regulations. Oversee the implementation of the Approval in Principle (AIP) obtained from the Accelerated Regulatory Integration and Oversight (ARIO) framework.
	Investor Sales &amp; Relations: Drive the sales of all investment offerings, manage relationships with existing investors, and cultivate new investor partnerships to expand the investor base.
	Marketing &amp; Market Penetration: Implement and oversee strategic marketing activities designed to achieve desired market penetration, brand visibility, and investor acquisition targets.
	Team Building &amp; Sales Leadership: Recruit, build, and lead a high-performance sales team dedicated to continuously selling DreamCity Capital&#39;s investment offerings and consistently meeting revenue targets.
	Strategic Product Development: Collaborate with the product development team to conceptualize and launch innovative investment products from investors feedback that cater to diverse investor segments and market trends to further deepen DCC investment offering portfolio.
	Investor Education &amp; Engagement: Develop and implement investor education programs and engagement initiatives to build trust, enhance financial literacy, and foster long-term investor loyalty.
	Financial Performance Management: Oversee the financial performance of all investment products, monitor key metrics, and implement strategies to optimize returns for investors and profitability for the company.
	Market Intelligence &amp; Competitive Analysis: Conduct ongoing market research and analysis to identify emerging trends, competitor activities, and new opportunities within the REIT and broader investment landscape.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or a related field.
	A minimum of 7 years of progressive, verifiable experience in REIT management, capital markets, investment banking, or fund management, with at least 3 years in a senior leadership capacity.
	A Master&#39;s degree (MBA, M.Sc. Finance) is an added advantage.
	Strong understanding of digital investment platforms, fintech operations, and technology-driven investment solutions. 4. Excel proficiency
	Proven track record of building, leading, and motivating high-performance sales teams to achieve revenue targets.
	In-depth knowledge of SEC regulations, REIT and Co-ownership frameworks, and the Nigerian capital market landscape.
	Experience in developing and executing investor education programs and managing investor relations.
	Strong financial modeling, analytical, and strategic planning skills.
	Candidates must be resident in Lagos with the flexibility to work extended hours as required.
	Candidates must be within the age range of 35 to 45 years.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certifications such as Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA), Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers (CIS), or ONLINE TECHNOLOGY.
	Experience with ARIPframeworks and regulatory approvals for investment platforms.
	Proven network within the Nigerian investment and financial services community.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Curriculum Vitae (CV) and a detailed Cover Letter to:&nbsp;recruitment.office@dreamcityproperty.com&nbsp;using &quot;General Manager, DreamCity Capital&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

General Manager Job at DreamCity Capital




        
    

        
        DreamCity Capital is a pioneering and rapidly growing platform at the intersection of real estate and digital investment. We specialize in democratizing access to premium real estate assets through innovative structures like Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs) and technology-driven investment products. Our mission is to deliver superior returns and financial inclusion while upholding the highest standards of integrity and compliance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time & On-Site

Position Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an accomplished General Manager for DreamCity Capital with a minimum of 7 years of specialized experience in REIT management, capital markets, and investment platform operations.
	The ideal candidate will be a strategic leader with deep financial expertise, strong regulatory knowledge, and a proven ability to drive sales, build high-performing teams, and ensure platform excellence.
	This role is pivotal in positioning DreamCity Capital as a market leader in Nigeria's evolving investment landscape.


Key Responsibilities


	Project Creation & Offerings: Oversee the end-to-end creation, structuring, and launching of investment projects and offers on the DCC platform, ensuring they meet market demands and investor expectations.
	Regulatory Compliance & SEC Liaison: Serve as the primary liaison with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and other regulatory bodies, ensuring full compliance with all investment regulations. Oversee the implementation of the Approval in Principle (AIP) obtained from the Accelerated Regulatory Integration and Oversight (ARIO) framework.
	Investor Sales & Relations: Drive the sales of all investment offerings, manage relationships with existing investors, and cultivate new investor partnerships to expand the investor base.
	Marketing & Market Penetration: Implement and oversee strategic marketing activities designed to achieve desired market penetration, brand visibility, and investor acquisition targets.
	Team Building & Sales Leadership: Recruit, build, and lead a high-performance sales team dedicated to continuously selling DreamCity Capital's investment offerings and consistently meeting revenue targets.
	Strategic Product Development: Collaborate with the product development team to conceptualize and launch innovative investment products from investors feedback that cater to diverse investor segments and market trends to further deepen DCC investment offering portfolio.
	Investor Education & Engagement: Develop and implement investor education programs and engagement initiatives to build trust, enhance financial literacy, and foster long-term investor loyalty.
	Financial Performance Management: Oversee the financial performance of all investment products, monitor key metrics, and implement strategies to optimize returns for investors and profitability for the company.
	Market Intelligence & Competitive Analysis: Conduct ongoing market research and analysis to identify emerging trends, competitor activities, and new opportunities within the REIT and broader investment landscape.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or a related field.
	A minimum of 7 years of progressive, verifiable experience in REIT management, capital markets, investment banking, or fund management, with at least 3 years in a senior leadership capacity.
	A Master's degree (MBA, M.Sc. Finance) is an added advantage.
	Strong understanding of digital investment platforms, fintech operations, and technology-driven investment solutions. 4. Excel proficiency
	Proven track record of building, leading, and motivating high-performance sales teams to achieve revenue targets.
	In-depth knowledge of SEC regulations, REIT and Co-ownership frameworks, and the Nigerian capital market landscape.
	Experience in developing and executing investor education programs and managing investor relations.
	Strong financial modeling, analytical, and strategic planning skills.
	Candidates must be resident in Lagos with the flexibility to work extended hours as required.
	Candidates must be within the age range of 35 to 45 years.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certifications such as Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA), Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers (CIS), or ONLINE TECHNOLOGY.
	Experience with ARIPframeworks and regulatory approvals for investment platforms.
	Proven network within the Nigerian investment and financial services community.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Curriculum Vitae (CV) and a detailed Cover Letter to: [email protected] using "General Manager, DreamCity Capital" as the subject of the mail.
